mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analytics_audit_log ( user_id, view_id, report_key, view_name, period_type, period_label, current_start, current_end, previous_start, previous_end, current_rounds, previous_rounds, current_users, previous_users, current_groups, previous_groups, delta_rounds, delta_pct, top_groups_json ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{viewId}, #{reportKey}, #{viewName}, #{periodType}, #{periodLabel}, #{currentStart}, #{currentEnd}, #{previousStart}, #{previousEnd}, #{currentRounds}, #{previousRounds}, #{currentUsers}, #{previousUsers}, #{currentGroups}, #{previousGroups}, #{deltaRounds}, #{deltaPct}, #{topGroupsJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM analytics_audit_log a LEFT JOIN analytics_llm_insight i ON i.audit_log_id = a.id WHERE a.report_key = #{reportKey} AND i.id IS NULL ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
